children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and parse input data from source into raw_data store
children.behavior: Accepts input JSON, extracts source, reads data, parses it, and writes to raw_data store. Logs the operation.
postconditions: raw_data store populated with ingested records

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child writes parsed data to raw_data store

outputs.name: ingest_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

global_vars.description: child writes parsed data to raw_data store

data_operations.description: child writes parsed data to raw_data store

constraints.description: raw_data must be initialized before write

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data store contains ingested records after execution

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformations to data in raw_data and write to processed_data
children.behavior: Reads from raw_data, applies transformation rules (e.g., mapping, cleaning), writes transformed records to processed_data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads raw data for transformation
child writes transformed data to processed_data store

outputs.name: transform_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

global_vars.description: child reads raw data for transformation
child writes transformed data to processed_data store

data_operations.description: child reads raw data for transformation
child writes transformed data to processed_data store

constraints.description: raw_data must be populated before read
processed_data must be initialized before write

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data store contains transformed records after execution

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check quality of transformed data and mark valid/invalid records
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, applies validation rules (e.g., schema, range), updates processed_data with validity flags. Logs the operation.
postconditions: processed_data store has validity flags set

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads processed_data for validation and updates it with validity flags

outputs.name: validate_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, valid count, invalid count

global_vars.description: child reads processed_data for validation and updates it with validity flags

data_operations.description: child reads processed_data for validation and updates it with validity flags

constraints.description: processed_data must be populated before read

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data store has validity flags set after execution

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records from processed_data to output
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, filters for valid records, formats output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads processed_data to filter valid records for export

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

global_vars.description: child reads processed_data to filter valid records for export

data_operations.description: child reads processed_data to filter valid records for export

constraints.description: processed_data must have validity flags set before read

acceptance_criteria.description: output contains only valid records after execution

governance_notes: All children are pure functions that operate on global data stores (raw_data, processed_data) via internal leaf accesses. No side effects beyond these stores. Constraints enforce proper sequencing (e.g., raw_data must be populated before TransformData reads it). Acceptance criteria verify store state after execution. Capabilities are derived directly from internal_leaf_accesses.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures remain unchanged from Stage 2. No resources added to signatures.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses map directly to global_vars and data_operations with identical resource names and operations. For example, IngestData's raw_data write appears in all three fields.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: global_vars and data_operations are perfectly synchronized for all children. Each resource/op pair in internal_leaf_accesses appears in both global_vars and data_operations.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources (raw_data, processed_data) and operations (read, write, read_write) from internal_leaf_accesses are fully covered in global_vars, data_operations, and requested_capabilities.
